Overview
General Psychology 20
Assignment #6 Overview
 Section 3:  Neurosis
Objectives:
• To understand abnormal behaviours from the context of knowing normal behaviour
• To be aware that anxiety is the basis of all neurosis
• To categorize the impact of neurosis in terms of physical, mental, and emotional
conditions
1.
